<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# spatialGE

<div class="section level1">

[![License:
MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/FridleyLab/spatialGE/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/FridleyLab/spatialGE/actions)
[![Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/shields/build/release/bioc/spatialGE.svg)](https://bioconductor.org/packages/spatialGE/)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/github/r-package/v/FridleyLab/spatialGE)](https://github.com/FridleyLab/spatialGE)
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1093%2Fbioinformatics%2Fbtac145-blue)](https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btac145)

![](reference/figures/logo.png)

An R package for the visualization and analysis of spatially-resolved
transcriptomics data, such as those generated with 10X Visium. The
**spatialGE** package features a data object (STlist: Spatial
Transctiptomics List) to store data and results from multiple tissue
sections, as well as associated analytical methods for:

-   Visualization: `STplot`, `gene_interpolation`,
    `STplot_interpolation` to explore gene expression in spatial
    context.
-   Spatial autocorrelation: `SThet`, `compare_SThet` to assess the
    level of spatial uniformity in gene expression by calculating
    Moran’s I and/or Geary’s C and qualitatively explore correlations
    with sample-level metadata (i.e., tissue type, therapy, disease
    status).
-   Tissue domain/niche detection: `STclust` to perform
    spatially-informed hierarchical clustering for prediction of tissue
    domains in samples.
-   Gene set spatial enrichment: `STenrich` to detect gene sets with
    indications of spatial patterns (i.e., non-spatially uniform gene
    set expression).
-   Gene expression spatial gradients: `STgradient` to detect genes with
    evidence of variation in expression with respect to a tissue domain.
-   Spatially-informed differential expression: `STdiff` to test for
    differentially expressed genes using mixed models with spatial
    covariance structures to account of spatial dependency among
    spots/cells. It also supports non-spatial tests (Wilcoxon’s and
    T-test).

The methods in the initial spatialGE release, technical details, and
their utility are presented in this publication:
<https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btac145>. For details on the
recently developed methods `STenrich`, `STgradient`, and `STdiff` please
refer to the spatialGE documentation.

![](reference/figures/spatialGE_workflow_v3.png)

<div class="section level2">

## Installation

The `spatialGE` repository is available at GitHub and can be installed
via `devtools`.

    options(timeout=9999999) # To avoid R closing connection with GitHub
    devtools::install_github("fridleylab/spatialGE")

</div>

<div class="section level2">

## How to use spatialGE

For tutorials on how to use `spatialGE`, please go to:
<https://fridleylab.github.io/spatialGE/>

The code for `spatialGE` can be found here:
<https://github.com/FridleyLab/spatialGE>

</div>

<div class="section level2">

## Function naming (v2.0.0)

In version 2.0.0, the package refactored its input handling with a
modular architecture. The primary function is now `STlist` (lowercase
‘l’). The legacy function `STList_legacy` has been preserved for
reproducibility of older workflows but is superseded and deprecated.

**New recommended function:** `STlist` - modular, extensible
implementation with platform-specific ingestors.

**Deprecated but still available:** `STList_legacy` - monolithic
implementation preserved for backward compatibility.

</div>

<div class="section level2">

## [spatialGE-Web](https://spatialge.moffitt.org)

A point-and-click web application that allows using spatialGE without
coding/scripting is available at <https://spatialge.moffitt.org> . The
web app currently supports Visium outputs and csv/tsv gene expression
files paired with csv/tsv coordinate files.

</div>

<div class="section level2">

## How to cite

When using spatialGE, please cite the following publication:

Ospina, O. E., Wilson C. M., Soupir, A. C., Berglund, A. Smalley, I.,
Tsai, K. Y., Fridley, B. L. 2022. spatialGE: quantification and
visualization of the tumor microenvironment heterogeneity using spatial
transcriptomics. Bioinformatics, 38:2645-2647.
<https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btac145>

[![](https://clustrmaps.com/map_v2.png?cl=a0d9e6&w=a&t=tt&d=MaZTayTGh9YYcDsI3LkJtKTJFTPygJFYO9LnIVaLr2Q&co=062f6e)](https://clustrmaps.com/site/1bwt8)

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# Package index

<div class="section level2">

## All functions

</div>

<div class="section level2">

-   `STList_legacy()` **\[superseded\]** : STlist (Legacy): Creation of
    STlist objects for spatial transcriptomics analysis
-   `STclust()` **\[stable\]** : STclust: Spatial clustering (modular
    implementation)
-   `STclust_legacy()` **\[superseded\]** : STclust: Detect clusters of
    spots/cells (legacy)
-   `STdiff()` **\[stable\]** : STdiff: Differential gene expression
    analysis for spatial transcriptomics
-   `STdiff_adjust_pvalues()` : STdiff_adjust_pvalues: Adjust p-values
    using multiple testing correction
-   `STdiff_check_convergence()` : STdiff_check_convergence: Check model
    convergence and extract summary statistics
-   `STdiff_extract_spatial_pvalues()` : STdiff_extract_spatial_pvalues:
    Extract spatial p-values from model results
-   `STdiff_fit_mm()` : STdiff_fit_mm: Fit non-spatial mixed models
-   `STdiff_fit_spatial_models()` : STdiff_fit_spatial_models: Fit spaMM
    spatial models with Matern covariance
-   `STdiff_fit_ttest()` : STdiff_fit_ttest: Fit non-spatial t-tests
-   `STdiff_fit_wilcoxon()` : STdiff_fit_wilcoxon: Fit non-spatial
    Wilcoxon tests
-   `STdiff_format_output()` : STdiff_format_output: Format results for
    user consumption
-   `STdiff_legacy()` **\[superseded\]** : STdiff: Differential gene
    expression analysis for spatial transcriptomics data (legacy)
-   `STdiff_run_nonspatial()` : STdiff_run_nonspatial: Run non-spatial
    differential expression tests
-   `STdiff_run_spatial()` : STdiff_run_spatial: Run spatial
    differential expression analysis
-   `STdiff_volcano()` : STdiff_volcano: Generates volcano plots from
    STdiff results
-   `STenrich()` `STenrich_legacy()` **\[stable\]** : STenrich: Test for
    spatial enrichment of gene expression sets
-   `STgradient()` **\[stable\]** : STgradient: Tests of gene expression
    spatial gradients
-   `STgradient_legacy()` **\[superseded\]** : STgradient_legacy: Tests
    of gene expression spatial gradients (legacy)
-   `SThet()` **\[stable\]** : SThet: Computes global spatial
    autocorrelation statistics on gene expression
-   `SThet_invdist_test()` : SThet_invdist_test: Computes spatial
    autocorrelation with statistical tests
-   `SThet_legacy()` **\[superseded\]** : SThet_legacy: Computes global
    spatial autocorrelation statistics on gene expression (legacy)
-   `STlist()` **\[stable\]** : STlist: Creation of STlist objects for
    spatial transcriptomics analysis
-   `STplot()` **\[stable\]** : STplot: Plots of gene expression,
    cluster memberships, and metadata in spatial context
-   `STplot_interpolation()` : STplot_interpolation: Visualize gene
    expression surfaces
-   `add_spatialGE_to_seurat()` **\[stable\]** : Add spatialGE results
    to Seurat object
-   `as.STlist.Seurat()` **\[stable\]** : Convert Seurat Object to
    STlist
-   `as.Seurat.STlist()` **\[stable\]** : Convert STlist to Seurat
    Object
-   `calculate_dist_matrices()` : calculate_dist_matrices: Calculate and
    scale distance matrices
-   `calculate_weighted_dist()` : calculate_weighted_dist: Calculate
    weighted distance matrices
-   `compare_SThet()` : compare_SThet: Compares spatial autocorrelation
    statistics across samples
-   `distribution_plots()` : per_unit_counts: Generates distribution
    plots of spot/cell meta data or gene expression
-   `filter_data()` : filter_data: Filters cells/spots, genes, or
    samples
-   `gene_interpolation()` : gene_interpolation: Spatial interpolation
    of gene expression
-   `get_gene_meta()` : get_gene_meta: Extract gene-level metadata and
    statistics
-   `get_hier_clusters_dtc()` : get_hier_clusters_dtc: Hierarchical
    clustering with DynamicTreeCut
-   `get_hier_clusters_ks()` : get_hier_clusters_ks: Hierarchical
    clustering with fixed k values
-   `load_images()` : load_images: Place tissue images within STlist
-   `plot_counts()` : plot_counts: Generates plots for the distribution
    of counts
-   `plot_image()` : plot_image: Generate a ggplot object of the tissue
    image
-   `pseudobulk_dim_plot()` : pseudobulk_dim_plot: Plot PCA of
    pseudobulk samples
-   `pseudobulk_heatmap()` : pseudobulk_heatmap: Heatmap of pseudobulk
    samples
-   `pseudobulk_samples()` : pseudobulk_samples: Aggregates counts into
    "pseudo bulk" samples
-   `spatialGE_from_seurat()` **\[stable\]** : Run spatialGE analysis on
    Seurat object
-   `spatialGE_to_seurat_genesets()` **\[stable\]** : Create
    Seurat-compatible gene sets from spatialGE results
-   `spatial_metadata()` : spatial_metadata: Prints the names of the
    available spot/cell annotations
-   `summarize_STlist()` : summarize_STlist: Generates a data frame with
    summary statistics
-   `tissue_names()` : tissue_names: Prints the names of the tissue
    samples in the STlist
-   `transform_data()` : transform_data: Transformation of spatial
    transcriptomics data

</div>

</div>

<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# Articles

<div class="section">

### Vignettes

<div class="section-desc">

</div>

-   [Basic functionality: Visualization, domain detection, and spatial
    heterogeneity](https://acsoupir-oc.github.io/spatialGE/articles/basic_functions_vignette.md):
-   [Seurat Integration: Bidirectional
    Workflows](https://acsoupir-oc.github.io/spatialGE/articles/seurat_integration.md):
-   [Spatially-informed differential gene
    expression](https://acsoupir-oc.github.io/spatialGE/articles/spatial_differential_expression.md):
-   [Detection of gene set spatial patterns and expression gradients in
    CosMx-SMI](https://acsoupir-oc.github.io/spatialGE/articles/spatial_enrichment_gradients_smi.md):
-   [Troubleshooting](https://acsoupir-oc.github.io/spatialGE/articles/troubleshooting.md):

</div>
